title: Registration of ICGV 87165 Peanut Germplasm Line with Multiple Resistance
abstract:
ICGV 87165, a high-yielding peanut (Arachis hypogaea L. subsp.
hypogaea var. hypogaea) germplasm line (Reg. no. GP-78, P1
594923) with multiple disease and insect resistance, was released
in 1994 by the Plant Materials Identification Committee of the
International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics
(ICRISAT) because of its resistance to rust (caused by Puccinia
arachidis Speg.) and late leaf spot [caused by Phaeoisariopsis personata
(Berk. & Curt.) Arx], and moderate resistance to bacterial
wilt [caused by Pseudomonas solanacearum (Smith) Smith], leaf
miner (Aproarema modicella Deventar), and tobacco caterpillar
[Spodoptera litura (F.)].
